description:
You are an intelligence analyst tasked with preserving online evidence. Archive the following US government websites as 'Webpage, Single File (*.mhtml)' files in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/':

- CIA World Factbook - Countries: https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/ (Save as: cia_world_factbook.mhtml)
- FBI Most Wanted: https://www.fbi.gov/wanted (Save as: fbi_most_wanted.mhtml)
- OFAC Sanctions Programs: https://ofac.treasury.gov/sanctions-programs-and-country-information (Save as: ofac_sanctions.mhtml)

Document the source URL, a brief description, and the local filename for each archived page in a catalog file at '/home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/evidence_catalog.txt'.
